title: Grants & Funding Opportunities
description: Federal, state, and private funding sources available for cybersecurity improvement initiatives

resources.title: CISA Cybersecurity Grant Program Guide
resources.description: Overview of CISA's State and Local Cybersecurity Grant Program (SLCGP) including eligibility, application process, and allowable uses of funds.

resources.title: SBA Cybersecurity Assistance Programs
resources.description: Summary of Small Business Administration resources for small business cybersecurity improvement including free tools, training, and financial assistance programs.

resources.title: Healthcare Cybersecurity Funding Opportunities
resources.description: Curated list of HHS, state health department, and private foundation funding opportunities for healthcare cybersecurity improvements, updated quarterly.

resources.title: Financial Services Cybersecurity Investment Justification Template
resources.description: Business case template for justifying cybersecurity investments to board and C-suite, including ROI calculation models and regulatory penalty cost analysis.

resources.title: Enterprise Grant Pursuit Strategy
resources.description: Strategic guide for enterprises seeking cybersecurity grants and funding, including grant writing best practices, compliance requirements, and reporting templates.
